# Bitsocial Spam Blocker

> Bitsocial Spam Blocker provides the public challenge package and shared schemas for Bitsocial spam risk checks.

This file is generated by `scripts/generate-llms-files.mjs`. Do not hand-edit it; update the source docs or generator config, then run `yarn llms:generate`.

## Canonical Links

- [Repository](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker)
- [Challenge package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@bitsocial/spam-blocker-challenge)
- [Bitsocial protocol](https://bitsocial.net)
- [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker/blob/master/llms-full.txt): Expanded inline corpus generated from the curated source docs.

## Critical Context

- This repo contains public integration code; hosted private server behavior lives outside this repository.
- packages/shared owns shared schemas and packages/challenge owns the PKC challenge integration.
- Generated llms files are compiled context for AI contributors, not runtime authority.

## Source Of Truth

- Code, tests, package manifests, source docs, and live/runtime evidence when relevant are source of truth.
- This generated file is compiled context for orientation. Verify behavioral claims against source files before editing or concluding.
- Repo-managed AI instructions live in `AGENTS.md` and any directory-specific `AGENTS.md` files.

## Core Documents

- [BitsocialSpamBlocker](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker/blob/master/README.md): A centralized spam detection service that evaluates publications and provides risk scores to help communities filter spam. This public workspace contains the integration packages:
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker/blob/master/AGENTS.md): This file defines the always-on rules for AI agents working on Bitsocial Spam Blocker. Use it as the default policy. Load linked playbooks only when their trigger condition applies.
- [@bitsocial/spam-blocker-challenge](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker/blob/master/packages/challenge/README.md): A Bitsocial challenge plugin that protects communities from spam by evaluating publication risk scores and optionally presenting an interactive challenge to users.
- [@bitsocial/spam-blocker-shared](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker/blob/master/packages/shared/README.md): Shared schemas and response types for the Bitsocial Spam Blocker integration surface.
- [Known Surprises](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker/blob/master/docs/agent-playbooks/known-surprises.md): Use this file for repo-specific surprises that are likely to recur.
- [Long-Running Agent Workflow](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker/blob/master/docs/agent-playbooks/long-running-agent-workflow.md): Use this playbook when a task spans multiple sessions, handoffs, or spawned agents.
- [Bug Investigation](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker/blob/master/docs/agent-playbooks/bug-investigation.md): Use this playbook when the user reports a bug or a regression.
- [Skills and Tools](https://github.com/bitsocialnet/spam-blocker/blob/master/docs/agent-playbooks/skills-and-tools.md): Use this playbook when setting up or updating agent skills for Bitsocial Spam Blocker.
